body.title: CLOSED: Datacenter agent helper device built on reference chat agent pattern
body.result: no-op/by-design: devices/claude/ is a rack registration device (bus mailboxes, YGM nudge), not a chat agent client. examples/chat_agent/agent.py is the pattern for NEW standalone Anthropic SDK agents. No alignment needed — different concerns. Any future agent-helper script should follow the reference pattern; no changes to devices/claude/ warranted.
body.description:
The reference chat agent (examples/chat_agent/agent.py) established the canonical pattern for direct-API Claude agent clients in this repo. Any CC/agent helper device added to agent_datacenter should either start from that skeleton directly, or be rebuilt to match it once the reference matures. Gate agent-helper device work on an explicit review of the reference design and a decision: build-on-it-now vs wait-for-it-to-mature.

**Affected files:** examples/chat_agent/agent.py, devices/ (future agent-helper device dir, TBD)
**Design rules:** two-sided capability build (handler + skill consumer ship together); vocabulary discipline (claim/dispatch/status/result verbs)
**Scope boundary:** IN — review reference design, file decision, create device stub if reference is ready. OUT — building the full agent-helper device (separate ticket), changes to the reference design itself.
**Test plan:** no tests in this ticket — it is a design-gate/decision ticket; the device ticket that follows will carry the test plan
body.pass_condition: A /decided entry exists stating whether to build agent-helper on current reference or wait; if build-now, device stub exists in devices/agent_helper/ extending BaseDevice.
